title: Danny Levi
description: NZ & Samoa international rugby league footballer
extract:
Daniel Levi (born 5 December 1995) is a professional rugby league footballer who played as a hooker for the Leeds Rhinos in the Super League He has played for New Zealand, New Zealand Māori and Samoa at international level.
He previously played for the Newcastle Knights, Brisbane Broncos, Manly Warringah Sea Eagles and the Canberra Raiders in the NRL, and the Huddersfield Giants in the Super League.
